vocab.components: Use .astro files for zero-JS static output. Add client:load, client:idle, or client:visible directives for interactive components.
vocab.api: Server endpoints in src/pages/api/*.ts. Export GET, POST, etc. handlers using APIContext type.
vocab.loading: Partial hydration with client:visible for below-fold components. Static pages are instant by default.
vocab.database: Astro DB (@astrojs/db) for local SQLite with type-safe schema. defineTable + column helpers.
vocab.content: Content Collections for Markdown/MDX. defineCollection with Zod schema. getCollection() for type-safe queries.
